# CWE-308 — Use of Single-factor Authentication (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-308-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

// Safe: requires password plus TOTP for high-value transfers.
func InitiateWire(c *gin.Context, db *sqlx.DB) {
	if c.PostForm("password") == "" || c.PostForm("totp") == "" {
		c.JSON(401, gin.H{"error": "mfa required"})
		return
	}
	if !c.GetBool("totp_valid") {
		c.JSON(401, gin.H{"error": "invalid second factor"})
		return
	}
	amount := c.PostForm("amount")
	_, _ = db.Exec("INSERT INTO wires (amount) VALUES (?)", amount)
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"queued": amount})
}
